queries.item: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_hotels` ( `hotel_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Sphinx hotel ID (e.g. s1-hotel-123)', `product_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to ?:products', `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `classification` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Star rating 1-5', `property_type` VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'hotel', `destination_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `destination_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `region_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `region_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `country_code` VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, `country_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `latitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `longitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `short_description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `image_url` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `amenities_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of amenity objects', `tags_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of tag objects', `facilities_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of facility objects from static endpoint', `is_recommended` ENUM('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N', `is_adults_only` ENUM('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N', `rating` DECIMAL(3,1) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Guest rating (e.g. 8.5)', `rating_count` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `sync_status` ENUM('active','inactive','error') DEFAULT 'active', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, KEY `idx_product_id` (`product_id`), KEY `idx_destination` (`destination_id`), KEY `idx_region` (`region_id`), KEY `idx_country` (`country_code`), KEY `idx_classification` (`classification`), KEY `idx_sync_status` (`sync_status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_destinations` ( `destination_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `type` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL COMMENT 'continent, country, region, city, destination', `parent_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `country_code` VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, `full_path` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Breadcrumb: City, Region, Country, Continent', `geoname_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `latitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `longitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `hotel_count` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, KEY `idx_type` (`type`), KEY `idx_parent` (`parent_id`), KEY `idx_country` (`country_code`), KEY `idx_full_path` (`full_path`(100)), KEY `idx_geoname` (`geoname_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_package_routes` ( `route_id` INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `transport_type` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT 'flight, bus', `departure_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, `departure_name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `departure_iata` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL, `arrival_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, `arrival_name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `arrival_iata` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL, `available_dates` JSON NOT NULL COMMENT 'Array of date strings', `duration` TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT 'Number of nights', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, UNIQUE KEY `uq_route` (`transport_type`, `departure_id`, `arrival_id`, `duration`), KEY `idx_departure` (`departure_id`), KEY `idx_arrival` (`arrival_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_bookings` ( `booking_id` INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `order_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `user_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `session_id` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL, `product_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `hotel_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `hotel_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `offer_id` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Original offer ID', `room_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `room_type` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `board_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `check_in` DATE DEFAULT NULL, `check_out` DATE DEFAULT NULL, `nights` SMALLINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `adults` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 2, `children` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `children_ages` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `num_rooms` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 1, `rooms_data` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `guest_name` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `holder_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_email` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_phone` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `guests_data` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `base_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00, `total_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00, `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR', `status` VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'pending', `api_booking_ref` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Booking reference from Sphinx API', `api_response` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Full API response JSON', `payment_terms_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Payment terms from Orders API', `cancellation_fees_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Cancellation fees from Orders API', `last_status_check` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last time status was polled from API', `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, KEY `idx_order_id` (`order_id`), KEY `idx_user_session` (`user_id`, `session_id`), KEY `idx_hotel` (`hotel_id`), KEY `idx_status` (`status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_sync_log` ( `log_id` INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `sync_type` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'destinations, hotels, routes, full', `status` ENUM('started','completed','failed') NOT NULL, `items_total` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `items_synced` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `items_failed` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `error_message` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `rate_limit_hits` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `sync_mode` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'full' COMMENT 'full or incremental', `duration_ms` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `started_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `completed_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, KEY `idx_type_status` (`sync_type`, `status`), KEY `idx_started` (`started_at`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_sync_log` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `rate_limit_hits` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0 AFTER `error_message`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_sync_log` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sync_mode` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'full' AFTER `rate_limit_hits`;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_circuits` ( `circuit_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Sphinx circuit ID', `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `summary` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `duration_days` SMALLINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `duration_nights` SMALLINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `transport_type` VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'flight, bus, etc', `destination_ids` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of destination IDs', `destination_names` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `departure_ids` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of departure point IDs', `departure_names` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `image_url` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `itinerary_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of itinerary days', `tags_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of tag objects', `min_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR', `sync_status` ENUM('active','inactive','error') DEFAULT 'active', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, KEY `idx_transport` (`transport_type`), KEY `idx_sync_status` (`sync_status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_experiences` ( `experience_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Sphinx experience ID', `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `summary` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `duration_hours` SMALLINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `duration_days` SMALLINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `destination_ids` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of destination IDs', `destination_names` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `pickup_points_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of pickup point objects', `image_url` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `highlights_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of highlight strings', `features_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of feature objects', `tags_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of tag objects', `min_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR', `sync_status` ENUM('active','inactive','error') DEFAULT 'active', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, KEY `idx_sync_status` (`sync_status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

language_variables.item: Ignore domains (comma-separated supplier IDs to skip)
Domenii ignorate (ID-uri furnizori separa»õi prin virgulƒÉ)
NumƒÉr maxim de verificƒÉri √Ænainte de timeout
"No Surprises" price threshold (%). 0 = disabled. Customer is warned if price increases by more than this %.
Prag "FƒÉrƒÉ Surprize" (%). 0 = dezactivat. Clientul este avertizat dacƒÉ pre»õul cre»ôte cu mai mult de acest %.
The price for "[hotel]" has changed from [old_price] to [new_price] [currency]. Your cart has been updated with the new price.
Pre»õul pentru "[hotel]" s-a modificat de la [old_price] la [new_price] [currency]. Co»ôul a fost actualizat cu noul pre»õ.
Too many booking requests. Please try again later.
Prea multe cereri de rezervare. VƒÉ rugƒÉm sƒÉ √Æncerca»õi din nou mai t√¢rziu.
Invalid booking data. Please check your input and try again.
Date de rezervare invalide. Verifica»õi datele introduse »ôi √Æncerca»õi din nou.
A booking for this offer is already pending. Please check your cart.
O rezervare pentru aceastƒÉ ofertƒÉ este deja √Æn a»ôteptare. Verifica»õi co»ôul dumneavoastrƒÉ.
Suggest alternative dates when no results found
SugereazƒÉ date alternative c√¢nd nu sunt rezultate
No deals available at this time.
CS-Cart category ID for Sphinx hotels
ID categorie CS-Cart pentru hoteluri Sphinx
CS-Cart category ID for Sphinx packages
ID categorie CS-Cart pentru pachete Sphinx
Sync targets (comma-separated). Supports: country codes (GR, BG), destination names (Crete, Rhodes), or destination IDs (1234)
»öinte sincronizare (separate prin virgulƒÉ). SuportƒÉ: coduri »õƒÉri (GR, BG), nume destina»õii (Crete, Rhodes), sau ID-uri destina»õii (1234)
This will fetch all destinations from the Sphinx API. Continue?
Se vor descƒÉrca toate destina»õiile din API-ul Sphinx. Continua»õi?
No destinations found. Run a sync first.
Nu s-au gƒÉsit destina»õii. Rula»õi mai √Ænt√¢i o sincronizare.
Sphinx API is not configured. Please set the API key in addon settings.
API-ul Sphinx nu este configurat. Seta»õi cheia API √Æn setƒÉrile addon-ului.
This will fetch hotels for the selected countries from the Sphinx API. Continue?
Se vor descƒÉrca hotelurile pentru »õƒÉrile selectate din API-ul Sphinx. Continua»õi?
No hotels found. Run a hotel sync first.
Nu s-au gƒÉsit hoteluri. Rula»õi mai √Ænt√¢i o sincronizare hoteluri.
This will create CS-Cart products for all unlinked Sphinx hotels. Continue?
Se vor crea produse CS-Cart pentru toate hotelurile Sphinx neasociate. Continua»õi?
No unlinked hotels found. All hotels already have products.
Nu s-au gƒÉsit hoteluri neasociate. Toate hotelurile au deja produse.
Sphinx booking failed for hotel "[hotel]" in order #[order_id]. Please verify and resubmit.
Rezervarea Sphinx a e»ôuat pentru hotelul ‚Äû[hotel]" √Æn comanda #[order_id]. Verifica»õi »ôi retrimite»õi.
The Sphinx offer for "[hotel]" is no longer available and has been removed from your order.
Oferta Sphinx pentru ‚Äû[hotel]" nu mai este disponibilƒÉ »ôi a fost eliminatƒÉ din comanda dvs.
All hotel offers in your cart are no longer available. Please search again.
Toate ofertele de hotel din co»ô nu mai sunt disponibile. VƒÉ rugƒÉm cƒÉuta»õi din nou.
No circuits found. Please try different filters.
Nu s-au gƒÉsit circuite. √éncerca»õi alte filtre.
Rezervarea circuitului a fost adƒÉugatƒÉ √Æn co»ô.
No experiences found. Please try different filters.
Nu s-au gƒÉsit experien»õe. √éncerca»õi alte filtre.
Rezervarea experien»õei a fost adƒÉugatƒÉ √Æn co»ô.
No packages found for your search criteria. Please try different dates or destination.
Nu s-au gƒÉsit pachete. √éncerca»õi alte date sau destina»õie.
Rezervarea pachetului a fost adƒÉugatƒÉ √Æn co»ô.
